sys_script_client.description:
Reopen completed or cancelled tasks; show a widget or UI Page modal to prompt the User when the task has subtasks, otherwise no modal just reopen single task 2.8.1 | 2023-04-06 | raj | STRY0137377 - (STRETCH- Prize) Manually Submitted Reopen Comment 2.8 | 2022-07-09 | raj | STRY0119137 - STRY0119138 (corrected platform page name while working other story) 2.8.0 | 2022-04-28 | mmcc | DFCT0010879 - Reopen Task button modal should display all options on the same line as the "Radio button" In function confirmReopenTasks() add size large for Portal and Platform
2.7.0 | 2021-08-29 | mmcc | STRY0107404 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal 2.7.0 | 2021-09-14 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP) Updated to show widget or UI Page modal 2.7.0 | 2021-10-7 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP) Title text updated to meet new requirements 2.7.0 | 2021-10-8 | mmcc | STRY0109110 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal- Add Descendant tasks count var taskId changed to taskSysId 2.7.0 | 2021-11-08 | mmcc | DFCT0010645 - Platform Reopen Task button does not open modal for some Views Not all Views will have active on the form, set g_scratchpad.active in onLoad Business Rule 2.7.0 | 2021-11-16 | raj | STRY0113839 - Technical Story: Pages/Portal/Page should be picked up from the "Form preferences"
v2.5.13 - Check if parent is closed - prompt user if can't reopen - Check if any subtasks are closed incomplete - prompt user if subtasks are closed incomplete and prompt to determine if user would like to reopen - reopen tasks and subtasks if confirmed
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Title - Reopen Selection for Tasker - Reopen Parent is not active - start Tasker - Reopen Parent is not active - end Tasker - Closed too long to reopen 1 Tasker - Closed too long to reopen 2 Tasker - Closed too long to reopen 3
sys_script_client.name: Task - onSubmit - Reopen
